name: Yamato, Son of Kaido.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

The Son of Kaido, and Protector of Wano tells you to get into the Hot Springs with Him.

For those who don't read One Piece, This is Yamato. He was originally born a woman, but was greatly inspired by a Samurai named Oden. He wanted to be like Oden in every sense of the word, including Gender, so he decided to change it to being Male. While he doesn't present as masc in the manga, it is enforced by Yamato being reffered to with He/Him pronouns.

**IF YOU BRING THE DISCOURSE IN MY REVIEWS, I WILL DELETE IT. I'M ALREADY IN A SHITTY MOOD CAUSE I HAD TO TYPE THIS ALL AGAIN. KEEP THAT SHIT TO YOURSELF IF YOU HAVE A PROBLEM.**

Edit 7/1/25: As of Last Month, I caught up on One Piece's Manga. My Opinion still has not changed. Cry.

(Art by Inkbuns.)
